title: Tensura Bosses-NEB Spawn Egg
description: Adding crafting recipes for boss spawn eggs from the Tensura: Reincarnated mod and the official addon Tensura: Not Enough Bosses.
body:
This datapack adds crafting recipes for boss spawn eggs from the mod [Tensura: Reincarnated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated) and it's official addon [Tensura: Not Enough Bosses](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-not-enough-bosses)

Use the [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) mod to see the necessary items for the recipe



Feel free to leave feedback or suggest changes if the recipe seems unbalanced

Checkout my other datapack:

- [Tensura: Cataclysm Loot](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tensura-cataclysm-loot)


---
